seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Range National Park and Capel. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Range National Park vs Capel: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Range National Park and Capel.
heading: Cape Range National Park vs Capel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Range National Park, Western Australia and Capel, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Range National Park has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Capel (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Range National Park or Capel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Range National Park has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Capel scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Range National Park scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Capel scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Range National Park or Capel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Range National Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
